content.subject: CRREM Board Quarterly Review
content.text:
created: CRREM Board Quarterly Review
When: 2026-06-12T14:00:00+02:00 to 2026-06-12T16:30:00+02:00
Where: Amsterdam HQ + Teams link
Attendees: hans@crrem.org, omar@crrem.org, board@crrem.org

Quarterly review with full board. Methodology update, ASP cohort growth, funding pipeline.
